workflows.name: Feature Engineering Loop
workflows.description: Standard loop for implementing a new feature with TDD and documentation.
steps: dev.kit skills run "Define test cases for <feature>"
dev.kit skills run "Implement <feature> code and tests"
dev.kit skills run "Resolve repo drift for <task_id>"

workflows.name: Resilient Bugfix Loop
workflows.description: Lifecycle for identifying, fixing, and verifying a bug.
steps: dev.kit skills run "Reproduce <bug> with a test case"
dev.kit skills run "Verify fix with test suite"
dev.kit skills run "Resolve repo drift for <task_id>"

workflows.name: Knowledge & Doc Sync
workflows.description: Workflow for synchronizing repository documentation and AI context.
steps: dev.kit skills run "Audit repo for documentation drift"
dev.kit skills run "Generate Mermaid diagrams for architecture updates"
dev.kit skills run "Update docs/reference and AI context"
dev.kit skills run "Resolve repo drift --message 'Docs: Sync'"
